channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Australian Open: Iga Swiatek will face Madison Keys in the semifinals. Ben Shelton wins, too
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Iga Swiatek is dominating her Australian Open opponents the way no one has at Melbourne Park since Maria Sharapova in 2013. Swiatek's latest lopsided win came via a 6-1, 6-2 score in the quarterfinals against No. 8 seed Emma Navarro on Wednesday. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers goes on trial over allegations of domestic violence
item.description: QUINCY, Mass. (AP) — Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is scheduled to go on trial Wednesday for allegedly shoving his girlfriend's head into a wall and repeatedly choking her after she received a phone call while they were in bed together.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner elected to Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Used to leading off, Ichiro Suzuki got antsy when he had to wait. Considered a no-doubt pick for baseball's Hall of Fame and possibly the second unanimous selection, he waited by the phone for the expected call Tuesday. Fifteen minutes passed without a ring.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CC Sabathia goes into Baseball Hall of Fame with Bay Area pride
item.description: The Vallejo-born left-hander was elected to the Baseball Hall of Fame on the first ballot with 86.8% of the vote.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agree to a multiyear contract extension after a 14-win season
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agreed to terms on a multiyear contract extension on Tuesday, following a 14-3 regular season that defied external widespread preseason projections of at least a losing record if not a last-place finish in the NFC North.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liverpool beats Lille to reach Champions League round of 16. Barcelona wins 9-goal thriller
item.description: Liverpool became the first team to guarantee a place in the last 16 of the new Champions League format by beating Lille 2-1 on Tuesday, while Barcelona fought back from two goals down to stun Benfica 5-4 in a thriller.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: With Ben Johnson on the move to Chicago, 5 head coaching vacancies remain
item.description: Ben Johnson made a quick decision. Aaron Glenn could be next. With Johnson heading to Chicago and Mike Vrabel already in New England, five head coaching vacancies remain. The Jets, Saints, Jaguars, Raiders and Cowboys are still in the hunt.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tennis pro Erin Routliffe explodes over lack of 'robots' at Australian Open
item.description: Erin Routliffe erupted during the third round of the Australian Open after she believed her opponent's serve skimmed the net. There was no device to back her claim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Novak Djokovic bests Carlos Alcaraz in Australian Open matchup as he pursues historic 25th Grand Slam title
item.description: Novak Djokovic is chasing history after defeating Carlos Alcaraz in a grueling 3 1/2-hour match in the quarterfinals of the Australian Open on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brittney Griner to test the market for the first time in career as WNBA free agency opens
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Brittney Griner is testing the free agent market for the first time in her career. The All-Star center is taking meetings starting Tuesday with multiple teams, according to her agent. WNBA executives were in Miami for the opening of Unrivaled to talk with Griner and other free agents.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Auburn faces No. 6 Tennessee in loaded week for SEC in AP Top 25
item.description: The Southeastern Conference can make a strong argument as the best league in college basketball with eight ranked teams and five in the top 10. The bevy of AP Top 25 teams leads to ranked SEC teams playing each other pretty much every week.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Several Chicagoland AMC locations to air the College Football Playoff championship game
item.description: CHICAGO — Notre Dame will face off against Ohio State on Monday in the College Football Playoff championship game in Atlanta, and while traveling to the game may not be an option for some, fans in Chicago can still get a taste of the larger-than-life action at some AMC theaters.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, WGN 9
